Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class WireWithdrawalScheduleRetirementDistribution

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.WireWithdrawalScheduleRetirementDistribution
public class WireWithdrawalScheduleRetirementDistribution extends Object
WireWithdrawalScheduleRetirementDistribution - The distribution info for a retirement account

    • WireWithdrawalScheduleRetirementDistribution

      public WireWithdrawalScheduleRetirementDistribution()

  • Method Details

    • federalTaxWithholding

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<WireWithdrawalScheduleFederalTaxWithholding> federalTaxWithholding()
      The federal tax withholding.

    • receivingInstitution

      public Optional<String> receivingInstitution()
      The institution receiving retirement funds when performing a transfer to an identical retirement account type at a different financial institution. This is required for check and wire withdrawals because we can't always identify the institution using the transfer instructions. For cash journals this value will default to "Apex Clearing", regardless of what is passed in here

    • stateTaxWithholding

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<WireWithdrawalScheduleStateTaxWithholding> stateTaxWithholding()
      The state tax withholding.

    • stateWithholdingWaiver

      public Optional<Boolean> stateWithholdingWaiver()
      Whether or not this distribution has a state withholding waiver.

    • taxYear

      public Optional<Integer> taxYear()
      Tax year for which the distribution is applied.

    • type

      public Optional<WireWithdrawalScheduleType> type()
      The type of retirement distribution.

    • builder

    • withReceivingInstitution

      public WireWithdrawalScheduleRetirementDistribution withReceivingInstitution(String receivingInstitution)
      The institution receiving retirement funds when performing a transfer to an identical retirement account type at a different financial institution. This is required for check and wire withdrawals because we can't always identify the institution using the transfer instructions. For cash journals this value will default to "Apex Clearing", regardless of what is passed in here

    • withReceivingInstitution

      public WireWithdrawalScheduleRetirementDistribution withReceivingInstitution(Optional<String> receivingInstitution)
      The institution receiving retirement funds when performing a transfer to an identical retirement account type at a different financial institution. This is required for check and wire withdrawals because we can't always identify the institution using the transfer instructions. For cash journals this value will default to "Apex Clearing", regardless of what is passed in here
